description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean, white exterior walls. The front facade is dominated by large, grid-patterned windows on both the ground and upper levels, allowing for ample natural light. A set of wide steps leads up to a raised entry platform with a black metal railing, creating a welcoming entrance. The side and rear elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on solid wall surfaces, though one side includes a set of floor-to-ceiling glass doors framed in wood. The overall structure is rectangular and spacious, with a clear emphasis on geometric lines and open interior space. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, glass, and metal, with some wood accents.
description: A modern, rectangular house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a raised entry with black railings. The design emphasizes clean lines, open space, and a mix of glass, concrete, and metal.
description_view_0: Front view shows large grid windows on both floors, a central staircase, and a raised entry platform with black railings.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a mostly solid white wall with a prominent set of floor-to-ceiling glass doors framed in wood and a small overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a row of tall glass doors, minimal windows, and a secondary set of steps leading to a smaller platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a plain white wall with a small set of windows and a secondary entry or service door.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large grid-patterned windows and floor-to-ceiling glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase leading to a raised entry platform with black metal railings and large glass doors
